powerpagecomponent.name: Request Documents
powerpagecomponent.searchcontent:
Upload supporting files{% assign homeurl = website.adx_partialurl %}

Upload supporting files

Add screenshots, forms, or other documents that help explain your submitted service request.

{% if user %}
Signed in {{ user.fullname | default: user.emailaddress1 | escape }} Customer account
{% endif %}
{% if user and request.params.id %}
Secure file upload Files added here are stored securely with this service request.
Return to intake
Loading the file upload area for this request...
{% entityform name: 'ESI - Service Request SharePoint Documents' %}
{% elsif user %}
Missing request

Open this page from a submitted request

The upload page needs a service request ID so files can be saved to the correct request.

Return to intake
{% else %}
Secure upload

Sign in to upload files

Please sign in so we can confirm you have access to this service request and its documents.

Sign in to continue
{% endif %} Request Documents
